pred_reason: The contract exhibits multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities (SWC-107) in functions like claimValues and contains integer overflow risks (SWC-101) in arithmetic operations including decimalShift calculations and daily limits. Evidence: Reentrancy found in claimValues function when transferring ERC-20 tokens; Integer overflow risk in decimalShift bounds validation (-77 to 77 range); Overflow vulnerabilities in daily limit calculations using totalSpentPerDay
